title: Daily Routines of the Hanson Family
passage:
Today, at half past five, Mrs. Hanson gets up. She goes to the bathroom, brushes her teeth and washes her face. Then she goes to the kitchen and makes breakfast. Next, Mr. Hanson gets up. He goes to the bathroom and has a shower. He wakes up(把……叫醒) his children Ann and Antony at seven o'clock. They are still tired but they get dressed. Then they have breakfast.

After breakfast, the children go to school. Mr. Hanson goes to work. He works at a radio station. Mrs. Hanson works at home. The children stay at school from eight o'clock to one o'clock in the afternoon. Then they go home and have lunch. Mr. Hanson doesn't go home for lunch. He has it at a restaurant near the radio station. The children do their homework after lunch. Then Antony has his soccer class. Ann stays at home and reads her books.

Mr. Hanson comes home at six o'clock. The family have dinner together. After dinner the children do the dishes. Then they watch TV and go to bed at ten o'clock.

questions.prompt: What does Ann do after she does her homework?
What do you think of the family's life? Why? Write 20 words or more.

blocks.text: I think the family has a happy and busy life.
Because they do their work and study well during the day.
And they also have a warm dinner and enjoy relaxing time together in the evening.
I think the family has a very boring and stressful life.
Because they have too much homework and never watch TV.
Overall, it is not good for children to have so many classes.
